content.content:
# CL:0000034 Stem Cell - Taxon Constraints and Definitions

## Taxon Constraints

The data shows **one taxon constraint** for this term:
- **in_taxon**: Human (NCBITaxon_9606)

No `never_in_taxon` or `only_in_taxon` constraints are present in the record.

## Current Axioms and Definition

**Primary Definition:**
"A relatively undifferentiated cell that retains the ability to divide and proliferate throughout life to provide progenitor cells that can differentiate into specialized cells."

This concise definition emphasizes three key properties: undifferentiated state, self-renewal capacity, and potential for specialization.

**Extended Definition:**
An expanded description notes that stem cells possess remarkable developmental plasticity and distinguishes two primary categories: embryonic stem cells (capable of becoming any cell type) and adult stem cells (restricted to specific lineages). The description highlights medical applications including tissue repair and disease modeling, while noting this extended content may not apply uniformly across all subtypes or species.

**Additional Metadata:**
- The term has child terms in the ontology hierarchy
- It appears in multiple curated subsets including human and mouse reference atlases
- Cross-references link to FMA, CALOHA, and ZFA ontologies

RELEASEDIR_IMPORTS=$(RELEASEDIR)/imports
#DOSDP is used for turning tsv files into pieces of ontologies for imports
stage_release: imports/reactome_xrefs_import.owl test $(ONT).owl $(ONT).obo $(ONT).json.gz $(GO_PLUS).owl $(GO_PLUS).json.gz go-base.owl $(GO_GAF).owl $(GO_AMIGO).owl $(GO_LEGO).owl $(GO_LEGO_REACTO).owl go-basic.obo go-basic.json.gz extensions/rhea-reactions.ttl imports/go-computed-taxon-constraints.obo subset-owls subset-reports generate-mappings
	$(ROBOT) convert -i go-edit-filtered-xrefs.ofn -o travis_build_dummy_out.ofn verify --queries $(VARGS) -O reports/ merge --collapse-import-closure false -i imports/go_taxon_constraints.owl -i imports/reactome_xrefs_import.owl -i ../taxon_constraints/present_in_taxon.ofn -i imports/go-catalytic-activities-participants.owl remove --term 'IAO:0000116' --axioms annotation --signature true query --update ../sparql/add-skos-xrefs.ru --update ../sparql/remove-broad-xrefs.ru --update ../sparql/remove-related-xrefs.ru remove --select 'complement' --drop-axiom-annotations 'oboInOwl:source' reason -r ELK -e asserted-only --exclude-duplicate-axioms true --exclude-tautologies structural relax reduce annotate -V $(RELEASE_URIBASE)/$(ONT).owl --annotation owl:versionInfo $(RELEASEDATE) convert --add-prefixes prefixes.jsonld -o travis_build_dummy_out.ofn verify --queries $(SPARQLDIR)/multiple-class-links-violation.sparql $(SPARQLDIR)/obsolete-reference-violation.sparql $(SPARQLDIR)/missing_superclass-violation.sparql $(SPARQLDIR)/different-namespace-violation.sparql -O reports/
clean: clean_target clean_imports
	mkdir -p $(RELEASEDIR_IMPORTS) &&\
	cp imports/*.owl $(RELEASEDIR_IMPORTS) &&\
	cp imports/*.obo $(RELEASEDIR_IMPORTS) &&\
	s3cmd -c $(S3CFG) --acl-public --mime-type=application/rdf+xml sync ./  s3://go-data-product-snapshot/ontology/
	s3cmd -c $(S3CFG) --acl-public --mime-type=application/rdf+xml sync ./  s3://go-data-product-current/ontology/
	s3cmd -c $(S3CFG) --acl-public --mime-type=application/rdf+xml sync ./  s3://go-data-product-release/$(RELEASEDATE)/ontology/
imports/reactome_xrefs_import.owl: ../resources/Reactions2GoTerms_human.txt ../resources/Pathways2GoTerms_human.txt
	$(ROBOT) convert --input reactome-tmp/reactome_xrefs.ofn --output imports/reactome_xrefs_import.owl annotate --ontology-iri $(BASE)/imports/reactome_xrefs_import.owl -V $(RELEASE_URIBASE)/$@ -o $@
# Remove reactome_xrefs_import.owl and go_taxon_constraints.owl from imports. These are merged in directly in enhanced.ofn
go-edit-trimmed-imports.obo: $(SRC)
	grep -v '^import: http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/go/imports/reactome_xrefs_import.owl' $< |\
	grep -v '^import: http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/go/imports/go_taxon_constraints.owl' >$@
go-edit-filtered-xrefs.ofn: go-edit-trimmed-imports.obo ../util/filter-rhea-xrefs.sc ../resources/rhea.rdf
	$(ROBOT) annotate -i go-edit-filtered-xrefs.ofn --annotation owl:versionInfo $(RELEASEDATE) merge --collapse-import-closure false -i imports/go_taxon_constraints.owl -i imports/reactome_xrefs_import.owl -i imports/go-catalytic-activities-participants.owl remove --term 'IAO:0000116' --axioms annotation --signature true query --update ../sparql/add-skos-xrefs.ru --update ../sparql/remove-broad-xrefs.ru --update ../sparql/remove-related-xrefs.ru remove --select 'complement' --drop-axiom-annotations 'oboInOwl:source' annotate --annotation owl:versionInfo $(RELEASEDATE) convert --add-prefixes prefixes.jsonld -o $@
$(GO_PLUS).ofn: reasoned.ofn imports/go-computed-taxon-constraints.owl
	$(ROBOT) unmerge -i $< -i imports/go_taxon_constraints.owl merge --collapse-import-closure true --include-annotations false merge -i imports/go-computed-taxon-constraints.owl annotate -O $(BASE)/$@ -V $(RELEASE_URIBASE)/$@ -o $@
	$(ROBOT) remove -i $< --select imports --trim false remove --base-iri 'http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GO_' --base-iri 'http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GOREL_' --base-iri 'http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GOCHE_' --base-iri 'http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/NCBITaxon_Union_' --axioms external --preserve-structure false --trim false merge -i extensions/go-gci.owl -i extensions/go-bridge.owl -i extensions/ro_pending.owl -i imports/x-disjoint.ofn annotate -O $(BASE)/$@ -V $(RELEASE_URIBASE)/$@ -o $@
$(GO_GAF).owl: extensions/go-gaf-edit.ofn $(GO_PLUS).owl extensions/gorel.owl mirror/cl.owl mirror/taxslim.owl mirror/taxslim-disjoint-over-in-taxon.owl
# Not all imports are being pre-mirrored; the ones that are should be dependencies
$(GO_LEGO).owl: extensions/go-lego-edit.ofn $(GO_PLUS).owl mirror/ro.owl extensions/legorel.owl extensions/go-bfo-bridge.owl mirror/taxslim.owl mirror/taxslim-disjoint-over-in-taxon.owl mirror/cl.owl mirror/uberon.owl mirror/users.ttl mirror/groups.ttl imports/go-lego-chebi-import.owl mirror/wbbt.owl mirror/eco.owl
#  - no imports or external ontologies
# go.obo is a simplified; we use oort to remove imports etc
	$(ROBOT) materialize --input $< --reasoner ELK $(addprefix --term ,$(GO_MAIN_RELATIONS)) remove --select imports --trim true remove --select '<http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GO_*>' --select complement --select classes --signature true --trim true remove $(addprefix --term ,$(GO_MAIN_RELATIONS)) --select complement --select object-properties --signature true --trim true annotate -O $(OBO)/$(ONT).owl -V $(RELEASE_URIBASE)/$(ONT).owl convert -f owl --output $@.tmp && mv $@.tmp $@
IMPORTS = chebi cl po pato ro ncbitaxon uberon ddanat fao oba so opl reactome_xrefs go_taxon_constraints
IMPORTS_OWL = $(patsubst %, imports/%_import.owl,$(IMPORTS)) $(patsubst %, imports/%_import.obo,$(IMPORTS))
all_imports: $(IMPORTS_OWL)
clean_imports:
seed.txt: enhanced.ofn imports/go_taxon_constraints.owl imports/go-taxon-groupings-edit.owl ../taxon_constraints/present_in_taxon.ofn imports/go-catalytic-activities-participants.owl
	$(ROBOT) merge --collapse-import-closure false -i enhanced.ofn -i imports/go_taxon_constraints.owl -i imports/go-taxon-groupings-edit.owl -i ../taxon_constraints/present_in_taxon.ofn -i imports/go-catalytic-activities-participants.owl query -f csv --select ../sparql/terms.sparql $@
imports/pr_terms_combined.txt: imports/pr_terms.txt seed.txt
imports/opl_terms_combined.txt: imports/opl_terms.txt seed.txt
imports/%_terms_combined.txt: imports/%_terms.txt seed.txt
# Use ROBOT for imports
imports/%_import_pre.owl: mirror/%.owl imports/%_terms_combined.txt $(SRC)
	$(ROBOT) extract -i $< -T imports/$*_terms_combined.txt --method BOT reason --exclude-duplicate-axioms true --exclude-tautologies structural annotate -O $(BASE)/imports/$*_import.owl -V $(RELEASE_URIBASE)/imports/$*_import.owl -o $@
.PRECIOUS: imports/%_import_pre.owl
imports/ncbitaxon_import.owl: imports/ncbitaxon_import_pre.owl ../sparql/add-taxon-sibling-disjoints.ru ../sparql/add-taxon-disjoints.ru ../sparql/add-in-taxon-disjoints.ru
imports/go_taxon_constraints.owl: ../taxon_constraints/only_in_taxon.ofn ../taxon_constraints/never_in_taxon.ofn ../taxon_constraints/present_in_taxon_annotations.ofn
imports/go-computed-taxon-constraints.owl: $(SRC) $(SPARQLDIR)/taxon-constraints-materialization.ru ../util/materialize-taxon-constraints.dl
imports/go-computed-taxon-constraints.obo: imports/go-computed-taxon-constraints.owl
	$(ROBOT) convert -i $< -o imports/go-computed-taxon-constraints.tmp.obo && grep -v '^owl-axioms' imports/go-computed-taxon-constraints.tmp.obo >$@
imports/%_import.owl: imports/%_import_pre.owl
imports/chebi_import.owl: bio-chebi.owl imports/chebi_terms_combined.txt $(SRC)
	$(ROBOT) extract -i bio-chebi.owl -T imports/chebi_terms_combined.txt --method BOT remove --term 'http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label' --term 'http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#inSubset' --term 'http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/go#chebi_ph7_3' --select complement --select annotation-properties --signature true annotate -O $(BASE)/$@ -V $(RELEASE_URIBASE)/$@ -o $@

	$(ROBOT) remove -i $< --select imports --trim false remove --base-iri 'http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GO_' --base-iri 'http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GOREL_' --base-iri 'http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GOCHE_' --base-iri 'http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/NCBITaxon_Union_' --axioms external --preserve-structure false --trim false merge -i extensions/go-gci.owl -i extensions/go-bridge.owl -i extensions/ro_pending.owl -i imports/x-disjoint.ofn annotate -O $(BASE)/$@ -V $(RELEASE_URIBASE)/$@ -o $@

input.command:
cat > /tmp/comment.md << 'EOF'
## Investigation: stem cell differentiation (GO:0048863)

@cmungall — confirmed your hypothesis. CL did remove the metazoa restriction from `CL:0000034 ! stem cell`, and GO's CL import is stale.

### Evidence

**Latest CL** (`cl-base.obo`, v2026-03-26):
```
[Term]
id: CL:0000034
name: stem cell
def: "A relatively undifferentiated cell that retains the ability to divide and proliferate throughout life..."
synonym: "animal stem cell" NARROW []
is_a: CL:0011115 ! precursor cell
intersection_of: CL:0000000 ! cell
intersection_of: RO:0002215 GO:0017145
relationship: RO:0002215 GO:0017145
property_value: RO:0002175 NCBITaxon:9606
```
No `in_taxon` (RO:0002162) restriction. No `is_a: CL:0000255 ! eukaryotic cell`. The "animal stem cell" synonym is now NARROW (was EXACT).

**GO's `src/ontology/imports/cl_import.obo`** (data-version `2025-07-23`, sourced from CL `2025-01-08` per `Makefile:CL_SOURCE`):
```
[Term]
id: CL:0000034
name: stem cell
...
synonym: "animal stem cell" EXACT []
is_a: CL:0000255 ! eukaryotic cell
is_a: CL:0011115 ! precursor cell
intersection_of: CL:0000000 ! cell
intersection_of: RO:0002215 GO:0017145
relationship: RO:0002162 NCBITaxon:33208     <-- stale: in_taxon Metazoa
relationship: RO:0002215 GO:0017145
property_value: RO:0002175 NCBITaxon:9606
```
The stale `relationship: RO:0002162 NCBITaxon:33208` is what's propagating to `GO:0048863 stem cell differentiation` (whose logical definition is `cell differentiation and results_in_acquisition_of_features_of some CL:0000034`), which is what produces the new violation against the Arabidopsis annotations.

The asserted GO taxon constraint on `GO:0048863` in `src/taxon_constraints/never_in_taxon.tsv` is only `never_in_taxon: Fungi` — the rest is being inferred from the stale CL axiom.

### Recommendation

Bump `CL_SOURCE` in `src/ontology/Makefile` from `releases/2025-01-08/cl-base.owl` to the latest CL release (currently `v2026-03-26`) and regenerate `imports/cl_import.{owl,obo}`. That removes the metazoa restriction at the source and is the canonical fix; patching the generated import files would be reverted on the next refresh.

Note that CL is ~14 months ahead of GO's pin, so the refresh will pull other CL changes too. Worth a separate PR with its own review (and probably a `make IMP=true update_repo` / equivalent ODK step), rather than bundling into this taxon-constraint cleanup.

### Related (not addressed here)

For the other terms in this thread:
- `cuticle development` (`GO:0042335`) — uses `UBERON:0001002 cuticle`; covered by https://github.com/obophenotype/uberon/issues/3694 plus your suggestion to drop the logical def or obsolete in favor of the more specific cuticle terms.
- `regulation of epidermal cell differentiation` (`GO:0045604`) regulates `GO:0009913 epidermal cell differentiation`, which has `results_in_acquisition_of_features_of CL:0000362 ! epidermal cell` — your call between obsoleting the GO class or dropping the logical def.

Both belong in their own issues / PRs.

---

- Model: `claude-opus-4-7`
- Agent harness: claude-code
- Triggered by: @cmungall
- Run: [View workflow run](https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/actions/runs/24921238534)
EOF

content.text:
Investigation complete. Confirmed the hypothesis: CL removed the `in_taxon Metazoa` restriction from `CL:0000034 stem cell` (latest CL `v2026-03-26`), but GO's `cl_import` is sourced from CL `2025-01-08` and still carries the stale `relationship: RO:0002162 NCBITaxon:33208` axiom. That stale axiom is what's propagating to `GO:0048863 stem cell differentiation` via its logical definition and producing the Arabidopsis taxon violations.

Recommendation posted to [#30555](https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/30555#issuecomment-4318147207): bump `CL_SOURCE` in `src/ontology/Makefile` and regenerate the CL import — separate PR rather than bundled into this issue, since 14 months of CL drift will bring other changes. No file edits made (the fix is a generated-artifact refresh, not a hand patch).
